markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy and instructor involvement for Udemy Business (UB) SEO efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/NYkxkecJAza3jz8Tm9xbb2BYRdnrGdzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on leveraging webinars and lecture transcripts as primary content sources for UB](https://fathom.video/share/NYkxkecJAza3jz8Tm9xbb2BYRdnrGdzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [Prioritize creating high-quality articles in the right blog experience over complex technical implementations](https://fathom.video/share/NYkxkecJAza3jz8Tm9xbb2BYRdnrGdzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Avoid producing "voice of the universe" content; differentiate with Udemy's unique instructor and thought leadership resources](https://fathom.video/share/NYkxkecJAza3jz8Tm9xbb2BYRdnrGdzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Sentence case (not title case) should be used for H2, H3, etc. in UB content per brand guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/NYkxkecJAza3jz8Tm9xbb2BYRdnrGdzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)

## Topics

### Content Sourcing Strategy

  - [Webinars identified as primary source of UB thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/NYkxkecJAza3jz8Tm9xbb2BYRdnrGdzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
      - [Extensive library and ongoing production of webinars with cutting-edge content](https://fathom.video/share/NYkxkecJAza3jz8Tm9xbb2BYRdnrGdzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)
      - [Easier to access and utilize compared to instructor-led content](https://fathom.video/share/NYkxkecJAza3jz8Tm9xbb2BYRdnrGdzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
  - [Lecture transcript database ("lecture articles") available as secondary source](https://fathom.video/share/NYkxkecJAza3jz8Tm9xbb2BYRdnrGdzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
      - [Requires SQL queries to access; may need to train Justin on usage](https://fathom.video/share/NYkxkecJAza3jz8Tm9xbb2BYRdnrGdzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
      - [Already being utilized successfully for consumer-side content](https://fathom.video/share/NYkxkecJAza3jz8Tm9xbb2BYRdnrGdzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)

### Instructor Involvement

  - [Direct instructor involvement not strictly necessary for UB content](https://fathom.video/share/NYkxkecJAza3jz8Tm9xbb2BYRdnrGdzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
  - [When involving instructors:](https://fathom.video/share/NYkxkecJAza3jz8Tm9xbb2BYRdnrGdzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
      - [Consumer side offers course links as value exchange](https://fathom.video/share/NYkxkecJAza3jz8Tm9xbb2BYRdnrGdzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
      - [UB side faces challenges with aligning instructor incentives to lead gen focus](https://fathom.video/share/NYkxkecJAza3jz8Tm9xbb2BYRdnrGdzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
  - [Recent changes to instructor compensation model (minutes consumed vs. per-purchase) may impact willingness to participate](https://fathom.video/share/NYkxkecJAza3jz8Tm9xbb2BYRdnrGdzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2015.0)

### Content Differentiation

  - [Emphasis on avoiding "voice of the universe" content](https://fathom.video/share/NYkxkecJAza3jz8Tm9xbb2BYRdnrGdzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Leverage Udemy's unique resources: instructor knowledge, internal expertise, webinars](https://fathom.video/share/NYkxkecJAza3jz8Tm9xbb2BYRdnrGdzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
  - [Concern about potential future Google penalties for "sludge" content](https://fathom.video/share/NYkxkecJAza3jz8Tm9xbb2BYRdnrGdzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [UB website facing performance issues; impacts user experience and potentially SEO](https://fathom.video/share/NYkxkecJAza3jz8Tm9xbb2BYRdnrGdzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2695.0)
  - [Initiative underway to holistically address technical SEO across Udemy subdomains](https://fathom.video/share/NYkxkecJAza3jz8Tm9xbb2BYRdnrGdzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2668.0)
  - [Prioritize engineering capacity towards improving page speeds and core user experience](https://fathom.video/share/NYkxkecJAza3jz8Tm9xbb2BYRdnrGdzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2611.0)

### Content Guidelines

  - [H2, H3, and other subheadings (excluding titles) should use sentence case, not title case](https://fathom.video/share/NYkxkecJAza3jz8Tm9xbb2BYRdnrGdzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2798.0)
  - [This differs from current consumer blog implementation](https://fathom.video/share/NYkxkecJAza3jz8Tm9xbb2BYRdnrGdzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2836.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Justin to investigate webinar content accessibility and potential integration with On24 platform](https://fathom.video/share/NYkxkecJAza3jz8Tm9xbb2BYRdnrGdzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2300.0)
  - [Kyle to synthesize discussions and provide observations/recommendations in next team meeting](https://fathom.video/share/NYkxkecJAza3jz8Tm9xbb2BYRdnrGdzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2182.0)
  - [Focus on creating momentum with high-quality articles in the right blog experience](https://fathom.video/share/NYkxkecJAza3jz8Tm9xbb2BYRdnrGdzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2572.0)
  - [Incorporate sentence case guideline into content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/NYkxkecJAza3jz8Tm9xbb2BYRdnrGdzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2817.0)
  - [Continue exploring lecture transcript database usage for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/NYkxkecJAza3jz8Tm9xbb2BYRdnrGdzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
